title: Chiseled Bricks Fix
description: Not all chiseled bricks had faces on them. So I fixed them.
body: So most chiseled bricks had faces on them. Well it started to annoy me that some of them don't. So I fixed it. Credits to Regentlamp85499 for making the tuff and the copper. And also credits to Nuttist for the idea + a lot of the bricks. ![Showcase of the Chiseled bricks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2ad22c29e30f671811b504514245fbd4a29d6dc.png)
